unitCategories.name: Fundamental
unitCategories.description: Fundamental SI units and basic derived units

units.name: Meter
units.description: Meter - SI base unit of length.

units.description: Kilometer - 1000 meters.

units.name: Centimeter

units.name: Millimeter
units.description: Millimeter - 0.001 meters.

units.description: Inch - Imperial unit of length.

units.name: Micrometer
units.description: Micrometer - 0.000001 meters.

units.name: Nanometer
units.description: Nanometer - 0.000000001 meters.

units.name: Angstrom
units.description: Angstrom - 10⁻¹⁰ meters, used for atomic scales.

units.name: Yard
units.description: Yard - Imperial unit of length.

units.name: Mile
units.description: Mile - Imperial unit of length.

units.name: Kilogram
units.description: Kilogram - SI base unit of mass.

units.name: Gram

units.name: Ton
units.description: Metric ton - 1000 kilograms.

units.name: Pound
units.description: Pound - Imperial unit of mass.

units.name: Hour

units.name: Day

units.name: Year
units.description: Year - 365.25 days (31557600 seconds).

units.name: Millisecond
units.description: Millisecond - 0.001 seconds.

units.name: Microsecond
units.description: Microsecond - 0.000001 seconds.

units.name: SquareFoot

units.name: CubicMeter

units.name: Milliliter
units.description: Milliliter - 0.001 liters.

units.name: Gallon

units.name: Dimensionless
units.description: Dimensionless - Pure number or ratio with no physical units.

units.name: Radian
units.description: Radian - SI derived unit of plane angle.

units.name: Degree
units.description: Degree - Common unit of plane angle.

units.name: NauticalMile
units.description: Nautical mile - 1852 meters, used in navigation.

units.name: Stone
units.description: Stone - Imperial unit of mass (14 pounds).

units.name: ShortTon
units.description: Short ton - US customary unit of mass (2000 pounds).

units.name: AtomicMassUnit
units.description: Atomic mass unit - 1/12 the mass of a carbon-12 atom.

units.name: Week
units.description: Week - 7 days.

units.name: Nanosecond
units.description: Nanosecond - 1e-9 seconds.

units.name: SquareKilometer

units.name: SquareCentimeter
units.description: Square centimeter - 1e-4 square meters.

units.name: SquareMile
units.description: Square mile - Imperial unit of area.

units.name: Hectare
units.description: Hectare - metric unit of area (10000 m²).

units.name: Acre
units.description: Acre - Imperial unit of area.

units.name: CubicCentimeter
units.description: Cubic centimeter - 1e-6 cubic meters.

units.name: CubicFoot
units.description: Cubic foot - Imperial unit of volume.

units.name: CubicInch
units.description: Cubic inch - Imperial unit of volume.

units.name: ImperialGallon
units.description: Imperial gallon - British unit of volume.

units.description: US liquid quart - US customary unit of volume.

units.description: US liquid pint - US customary unit of volume.

units.name: Gradian
units.description: Gradian - 1/400 of a full circle (π/200 rad).

units.name: Revolution
units.description: Revolution - one full circle (2π rad).

units.name: Milliradian
units.description: Milliradian - 0.001 radians.

units.name: Percent
units.description: Percent - one hundredth of unity.

units.name: PartPerMillion
units.description: Parts per million - 1e-6 dimensionless ratio.

units.name: PartPerBillion
units.description: Parts per billion - 1e-9 dimensionless ratio.

units.name: PercentByWeight
units.description: Percent by weight - mass fraction expressed as a percentage.

units.description: Bar - Metric unit of pressure.

units.description: Standard atmosphere - Unit of pressure.

units.description: Calorie - Thermochemical calorie, energy unit.

units.name: Horsepower

units.description: Electron volt - Energy unit equal to electron charge times one volt.

units.description: Meters per second to the fourth - SI derived unit of snap.

units.name: FootPerSecond

units.name: Knot
units.description: Knot - one nautical mile per hour.

units.name: StandardGravity
units.description: Standard gravity - acceleration of free fall at Earth's surface.

units.name: Kilonewton

units.name: Dyne
units.description: Dyne - CGS unit of force.

units.name: PoundForce
units.description: Pound-force - Imperial unit of force.

units.name: Kilopascal
units.description: Kilopascal - 1000 pascals.

units.name: Torr
units.description: Torr - 1/760 of a standard atmosphere.

units.name: Kilojoule
units.description: Kilojoule - 1000 joules.

units.name: Kilocalorie
units.description: Kilocalorie - 1000 thermochemical calories.

units.name: WattHour
units.description: Watt-hour - 3600 joules.

units.name: Erg
units.description: Erg - CGS unit of energy.

units.name: Btu

units.name: Kilowatt
units.description: Kilowatt - 1000 watts.

units.name: Megawatt
units.description: Megawatt - 1e6 watts.

units.name: WattPerCubicMeter
units.description: Watt per cubic meter - SI unit of volumetric power density.

units.description: Kelvin - SI base unit of thermodynamic temperature.

units.name: Fahrenheit
units.description: Fahrenheit - Imperial temperature scale.

units.description: Joule per kelvin - SI derived unit of entropy and heat capacity.

units.description: Joule per kilogram kelvin - SI derived unit of specific heat capacity.

units.description: Watt per square meter kelvin - SI derived unit of heat transfer coefficient.

units.name: PerKelvin
units.description: Per kelvin - SI derived unit of thermal expansion coefficient.

units.name: Rankine
units.description: Rankine - absolute temperature scale with Fahrenheit-sized degrees.

units.name: KelvinPerWatt
units.description: Kelvin per watt - SI unit of absolute thermal resistance.

units.description: Volt - SI derived unit of electric potential.

units.description: Volt per meter - SI derived unit of electric field strength.

units.name: Ohm
units.description: Ohm - SI derived unit of electric resistance.

units.name: Coulomb
units.description: Coulomb - SI derived unit of electric charge.

units.name: Farad
units.description: Farad - SI derived unit of electric capacitance.

units.name: Siemens
units.description: Siemens - SI derived unit of electric conductance.

units.name: Tesla
units.description: Tesla - SI derived unit of magnetic flux density.

units.name: Gauss
units.description: Gauss - CGS unit of magnetic flux density.

units.name: Weber
units.description: Weber - SI derived unit of magnetic flux.

units.name: Henry
units.description: Henry - SI derived unit of inductance.

units.name: Milliampere
units.description: Milliampere - 0.001 amperes.

units.name: Kiloampere
units.description: Kiloampere - 1000 amperes.

units.name: Kilovolt
units.description: Kilovolt - 1000 volts.

units.name: Kilohm
units.description: Kilohm - 1000 ohms.

units.name: Megohm
units.description: Megohm - 1e6 ohms.

units.name: Microfarad
units.description: Microfarad - 1e-6 farads.

units.name: Nanofarad
units.description: Nanofarad - 1e-9 farads.

units.name: Picofarad
units.description: Picofarad - 1e-12 farads.

units.name: AmpereHour
units.description: Ampere-hour - 3600 coulombs of electric charge.

units.name: VoltMeter
units.description: Volt meter - SI unit of electric flux.

units.name: FaradPerMeter
units.description: Farad per meter - SI unit of permittivity.

units.name: SiemensPerMeter
units.description: Siemens per meter - SI unit of electrical conductivity.

unitCategories.name: AngularMechanics
unitCategories.description: Units of rotational motion and angular quantities

units.description: Radians per second - SI derived unit of angular velocity.

units.name: RevolutionPerMinute
units.description: Revolutions per minute - Common unit of angular velocity.

units.name: RadianPerSecondSquared
units.description: Radians per second squared - SI derived unit of angular acceleration.

units.name: RadianPerSecondCubed
units.description: Radians per second cubed - SI derived unit of angular jerk.

unitCategories.name: Acoustics
unitCategories.description: Units of wave and oscillation phenomena

units.name: Hertz
units.description: Hertz - SI derived unit of frequency.

units.name: Kilohertz
units.description: Kilohertz - 1000 hertz.

units.name: Megahertz
units.description: Megahertz - 1e6 hertz.

units.name: Sone
units.description: Sone - psychoacoustic unit of perceived loudness.

units.name: Acum
units.description: Acum - psychoacoustic unit of perceived sharpness.

unitCategories.name: Optics
unitCategories.description: Units of optical and photometric quantities

units.name: Candela
units.description: Candela - SI base unit of luminous intensity.

units.name: Lumen
units.description: Lumen - SI derived unit of luminous flux.

units.name: Lux
units.description: Lux - SI derived unit of illuminance.

units.name: Diopter
units.description: Diopter - SI unit of optical power.

units.name: Millicandela
units.description: Millicandela - 0.001 candelas.

units.name: FootCandle
units.description: Foot-candle - Imperial unit of illuminance (lumen per square foot).

units.name: CandelaPerSquareMeter
units.description: Candela per square meter - SI unit of luminance.

units.name: Nit
units.description: Nit - common name for one candela per square meter.

units.name: FootLambert
units.description: Foot-lambert - Imperial unit of luminance (1/π candela per square foot).

unitCategories.description: Units of nuclear and radiation quantities

units.name: Becquerel
units.description: Becquerel - SI derived unit of radioactive activity.

units.name: Gray
units.description: Gray - SI derived unit of absorbed dose.

units.name: Sievert
units.description: Sievert - SI derived unit of equivalent dose.

units.name: Barn
units.description: Barn - Unit of nuclear cross section.

units.name: CoulombPerKilogram
units.description: Coulomb per kilogram - SI derived unit of radiation exposure.

units.name: Curie
units.description: Curie - traditional unit of radioactive activity.

units.name: Rad
units.description: Rad - traditional unit of absorbed dose (0.01 Gy).

units.name: Rem
units.description: Rem - traditional unit of equivalent dose (0.01 Sv).

units.name: Roentgen
units.description: Roentgen - traditional unit of ionizing radiation exposure.

units.description: Kilogram per cubic meter - SI derived unit of density.

units.name: GramPerCubicCentimeter
units.description: Gram per cubic centimeter - 1000 kg/m³.

units.name: GramPerLiter
units.description: Gram per liter - equal to one kilogram per cubic meter.

units.description: Mole - SI base unit of amount of substance.

units.name: Molar
units.description: Molar - Moles per liter concentration.

units.name: Kilomole

units.description: Millimole - 0.001 moles.

units.description: Millimolar - 0.001 moles per liter (1 mol/m³).

units.name: Micromolar
units.description: Micromolar - 1e-6 moles per liter (0.001 mol/m³).

units.name: Poise

units.description: Cubic meter per second - SI derived unit of volumetric flow rate.

units.name: LiterPerSecond

units.name: KilogramPerSecond
units.description: Kilogram per second - SI derived unit of mass flow rate.

units.name: NewtonPerMeter
units.description: Newton per meter - SI derived unit of surface tension.

units.name: Centipoise
units.description: Centipoise - 0.001 pascal seconds (viscosity of water at 20°C ≈ 1 cP).

units.name: DynePerCentimeter
units.description: Dyne per centimeter - CGS unit of surface tension.

units.name: KilogramPerMole
units.description: Kilogram per mole - SI derived unit of molar mass.

units.name: GramPerMole

units.name: Katal
units.description: Katal - SI derived unit of catalytic activity.

units.description: Mole per cubic meter second - SI derived unit of reaction rate.

units.description: Joule per mole - SI derived unit of molar energy.

units.description: Calorie per mole - thermochemical calorie per mole.

units.description: Enzyme unit - one micromole of substrate per minute.

units.name: Dalton
units.description: Dalton - molar mass numerically equal to one gram per mole.

units.name: PerSecond
units.description: Per second - SI unit of a first-order rate constant.
